watchStatements.excerpt: DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (varchar, smallint);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (varchar, integer);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (varchar, bigint);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.varchar_eq_smallint(varchar, smallint);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.varchar_eq_integer(varchar, integer);
DROP FUNCTION IF EXISTS public.varchar_eq_bigint(varchar, bigint);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (boolean, integer);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (integer, boolean);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.<> (boolean, integer);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.<> (integer, boolean);
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_notice_protocol_before_insert_idempotent ON public.notice_protocol;
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_notice_protocol_tmpl_before_insert_idempotent ON public.notice_protocol_tmpl;
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_notice_tmpl_before_insert_idempotent ON public.notice_tmpl;
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_notice_topic_before_insert_idempotent ON public.notice_topic;
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_notice_topic_tmpl_rel_before_insert_idempotent ON public.notice_topic_tmpl_rel;
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (text, bigint);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (bigint, text);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (boolean, text);
DROP OPERATOR IF EXISTS public.= (text, boolean);
